title: cyperus albus
intro: Cyperus albus, also known as the white papyrus or umbrella papyrus, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus albus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, making it a valuable natural remedy.
